"'''Raiding Sunfire Outpost'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2004]]. It depicts a battle between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces occupying [[Sunfire Outpost]] and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]].

==Continuity==
The scenario includes alternate rules for playing different factions at the Outpost.
